Deathtouch: Any amount of damage this deals to a creature is enough to destroy it.
Double Strike: This creature deals both first-strike and regular combat damage.
First Strike: This creature deals combat damage before creatures without first strike.
Flash: You may cast this card any time you could cast an instant.
Flying: This creature can't be blocked except by creatures with flying or reach.
Haste: This creature can attack and use abilities that require tapping as soon as it comes under your control.
Hexproof: This permanent can't be the target of spells or abilities your opponents control.
Indestructible: Damage and effects that say 'destroy' don't destroy this permanent.
Lifelink: Damage dealt by this creature also causes you to gain that much life.
Menace: This creature can't be blocked except by two or more creatures.
Reach: This creature can block creatures with flying.
Trample: This creature can deal excess combat damage to the defending player or planeswalker.
Vigilance: Attacking doesn't cause this creature to tap.
Ward: Whenever this permanent becomes the target of a spell or ability an opponent controls, counter it unless that player pays the ward cost.
Enchant: This Aura can target and attach only to the specified type of object or player.
Equip: Pay the equip cost to attach this Equipment to target creature you control; activate only as a sorcery.
Protection: This permanent can't be damaged, enchanted, equipped, blocked, or targeted by anything with the stated quality.
Shroud: This permanent can't be the target of spells or abilities.
Intimidate: This creature can't be blocked except by artifact creatures and/or creatures that share a color with it.
Fear: This creature can't be blocked except by artifact creatures and/or black creatures.
Shadow: This creature can't be blocked by creatures without shadow, and can't block creatures without shadow.
Horsemanship: This creature can't be blocked by creatures without horsemanship.
Banding: Banding modifies how combat damage is assigned; the controller of a banding creature chooses how damage is divided.
Rampage: Whenever this creature becomes blocked, it gets +N/+N until end of turn for each creature blocking it beyond the first.
Cumulative Upkeep: At the beginning of your upkeep, put an age counter on this permanent, then you may pay its cumulative upkeep cost for each age counter on it. If you don't, sacrifice it.
Flanking: Whenever this creature becomes blocked by a creature without flanking, the blocking creature gets -1/-1 until end of turn.
Phasing: This permanent phases in or out during its controller's untap step; phased-out permanents are treated as though they don't exist.
Buyback: You may pay an additional cost as you cast this spell; if you do, put this spell into its owner's hand instead of graveyard as it resolves.
Cycling: Discard this card: Draw a card.
Echo: At the beginning of your upkeep, if this permanent came under your control since the beginning of your last upkeep, sacrifice it unless you pay its echo cost.
Fading: This permanent enters with N fade counters; at the beginning of your upkeep, remove a fade counter or sacrifice it.
Kicker: You may pay an additional cost as you cast this spell.
Flashback: You may cast this card from your graveyard by paying its flashback cost rather than its mana cost; if you do, exile it as it resolves.
Madness: If you would discard this card, you may exile it instead; when you do, you may cast it by paying its madness cost.
Morph: You may cast this card face down as a 2/2 creature for {3}; turn it face up any time for its morph cost.
Amplify: As this creature enters the battlefield, reveal any number of creature cards from your hand that share a type with it; it enters with N +1/+1 counters for each card revealed.
Provoke: Whenever this creature attacks, you may have target creature defending player controls block it this combat if able; if you do, untap that creature.
Storm: When you cast this spell, copy it for each other spell cast before it this turn; you may choose new targets for the copies.
Affinity: This spell costs {1} less to cast for each permanent you control with the specified quality.
Entwine: You may pay the entwine cost in addition to the spell's cost; if you do, choose all modes instead of one.
Modular: This permanent enters with N +1/+1 counters; when it dies, you may put its +1/+1 counters on target artifact creature.
Sunburst: This permanent enters with a +1/+1 counter (if a creature) or charge counter (if not) for each color of mana spent to cast it.
Bushido: Whenever this creature blocks or becomes blocked, it gets +N/+N until end of turn.
Soulshift: When this permanent dies, you may return target Spirit card with mana value N or less from your graveyard to your hand.
Splice: You may reveal this card from your hand as you cast a spell of the specified type; if you do, that spell gains this card's text and you pay the splice cost.
Offering: You may sacrifice a permanent of the specified type as you cast this spell; if you do, reduce its cost by the sacrificed permanent's mana cost.
Ninjutsu: Pay the ninjutsu cost, return an unblocked attacking creature you control to hand: Put this card onto the battlefield from your hand tapped and attacking.
Epic: For the rest of the game, you can't cast spells; at the beginning of each of your upkeeps, copy this spell except for its epic ability.
Convoke: Your creatures can help cast this spell; each tapped creature pays for {1} or one mana of that creature's color.
Dredge: If you would draw a card, you may instead mill N cards and return this card from your graveyard to your hand.
Transmute: Discard this card: Search your library for a card with the same mana value, reveal it, put it into your hand, then shuffle; activate only as a sorcery.
Bloodthirst: If an opponent was dealt damage this turn, this permanent enters the battlefield with N +1/+1 counters on it.
Haunt: When this permanent dies, exile it haunting target creature; abilities that refer to the haunted creature refer to that creature.
Replicate: You may pay the replicate cost any number of times as you cast this spell; when you cast it, copy it for each time you paid.
Forecast: Activate only during your upkeep and only once each turn: Reveal this card from your hand and pay the cost to get the forecast effect.
Graft: This permanent enters with N +1/+1 counters; whenever another creature enters, you may move a +1/+1 counter from this onto that creature.
Recover: When a creature is put into your graveyard from the battlefield, you may pay the recover cost; if you do, return this card from your graveyard to your hand. Otherwise, exile it.
Ripple: When you cast this spell, you may reveal the top N cards of your library; you may cast any revealed cards with the same name without paying their mana costs.
Split Second: As long as this spell is on the stack, players can't cast other spells or activate abilities that aren't mana abilities.
Suspend: Rather than cast this card, you may pay its suspend cost and exile it with N time counters; remove a time counter at the beginning of your upkeep, and when the last is removed, cast it without paying its mana cost.
Vanishing: This permanent enters with N time counters; at the beginning of your upkeep, remove a time counter; when the last is removed, sacrifice it.
Absorb: If a source would deal damage to this creature, prevent N of that damage.
Aura Swap: Pay the aura swap cost: You may exchange this Aura with an Aura card in your hand.
Delve: For each generic mana in this spell's total cost, you may exile a card from your graveyard rather than pay that mana.
Fortify: Pay the fortify cost to attach this Fortification to target land you control; activate only as a sorcery.
Frenzy: Whenever this creature attacks and isn't blocked, it gets +N/+0 until end of turn.
Gravestorm: When you cast this spell, copy it for each permanent put into a graveyard from the battlefield this turn.
Poisonous: Whenever this creature deals combat damage to a player, that player gets N poison counters.
Transfigure: Sacrifice this permanent: Search your library for a creature card with the same mana value, put it onto the battlefield, then shuffle; activate only as a sorcery.
Champion: When this permanent enters the battlefield, sacrifice it unless you exile another permanent you control of the specified type; when this leaves the battlefield, return the exiled card to the battlefield.
Changeling: This object is every creature type.
Evoke: You may cast this card by paying its evoke cost rather than its mana cost; when it enters the battlefield, if the evoke cost was paid, sacrifice it.
Hideaway: When this permanent enters the battlefield, look at the top N cards of your library, exile one face down, put the rest on the bottom in random order.
Prowl: You may pay the prowl cost rather than this spell's mana cost if a player was dealt combat damage this turn by a source you controlled that shared a creature type with it.
Reinforce: Discard this card: Put N +1/+1 counters on target creature; activate only as a sorcery.
Conspire: As you cast this spell, you may tap two untapped creatures you control that share a color with it; if you do, copy it and you may choose new targets for the copy.
Persist: When this permanent dies, if it had no -1/-1 counters on it, return it to the battlefield under its owner's control with a -1/-1 counter on it.
Wither: Damage this deals to creatures is dealt in the form of -1/-1 counters.
Retrace: You may cast this card from your graveyard by discarding a land card as an additional cost.
Devour: As this permanent enters the battlefield, you may sacrifice any number of creatures; it enters with N +1/+1 counters for each creature sacrificed this way.
Exalted: Whenever a creature you control attacks alone, that creature gets +1/+1 until end of turn.
Unearth: Pay the unearth cost: Return this card from your graveyard to the battlefield; it gains haste; exile it at the beginning of the next end step; activate only as a sorcery.
Cascade: When you cast this spell, exile cards from the top of your library until you exile a nonland card with lesser mana value; you may cast it without paying its mana cost; put the rest on the bottom in random order.
Annihilator: Whenever this creature attacks, the defending player sacrifices N permanents.
Level Up: Pay the level up cost: Put a level counter on this permanent; activate only as a sorcery.
Rebound: If you cast this spell from your hand, exile it as it resolves; at the beginning of your next upkeep, you may cast it from exile without paying its mana cost.
Totem Armor: If enchanted permanent would be destroyed, instead remove all damage from it and destroy this Aura.
Infect: Damage this deals to creatures is in the form of -1/-1 counters; damage this deals to players is in the form of poison counters.
Battle Cry: Whenever this creature attacks, each other attacking creature gets +1/+0 until end of turn.
Living Weapon: When this Equipment enters the battlefield, create a 0/0 Germ creature token, then attach this Equipment to it.
Undying: When this permanent dies, if it had no +1/+1 counters on it, return it to the battlefield under its owner's control with a +1/+1 counter on it.
Miracle: You may reveal this card from your hand as you draw it if it's the first card you've drawn this turn; when you do, you may cast it by paying its miracle cost.
Soulbond: When this creature enters the battlefield or another creature enters under your control, you may pair it with an unpaired creature you control for as long as both remain on the battlefield.
Overload: You may pay the overload cost rather than the mana cost; if you do, change the text by replacing 'target' with 'each' in the spell's text.
Scry: Look at that many cards from the top of your library, then put any number of them on the bottom of your library and the rest on top in any order.
Prowess: Whenever you cast a noncreature spell, this creature gets +1/+1 until end of turn.
Dash: You may pay the dash cost rather than the mana cost; if you do, this creature gains haste and is returned to its owner's hand at the beginning of the next end step.
Exploit: When this creature enters the battlefield, you may sacrifice a creature.
Manifest: Look at the top card of your library; you may put it onto the battlefield face down as a 2/2 creature.
Megamorph: You may cast this card face down as a 2/2 for {3}; when you turn it face up, put a +1/+1 counter on it if its megamorph cost was paid.
Renown: When this creature deals combat damage to a player, if it isn't renowned, put a +1/+1 counter on it and it becomes renowned.
Awaken: You may pay the awaken cost when casting this spell; if you do, put N +1/+1 counters on target land you control and it becomes a 0/0 Elemental creature.
Ingest: Whenever this creature deals combat damage to a player, that player exiles the top card of their library.
Myriad: Whenever this creature attacks, for each opponent other than the defending player, create a token that's a copy of this creature that's tapped and attacking that player; exile the tokens at end of combat.
Surge: You may pay the surge cost rather than the mana cost if you or a teammate has cast another spell this turn.
Skulk: This creature can't be blocked by creatures with greater power.
Emerge: You may cast this spell by sacrificing a creature and paying the emerge cost reduced by the sacrificed creature's mana value.
Escalate: Pay the escalate cost for each chosen mode beyond the first.
Melee: Whenever this creature attacks, it gets +1/+1 until end of turn for each opponent you attacked this combat.
Crew: Tap any number of creatures you control with total power N or greater: This Vehicle becomes an artifact creature until end of turn.
Fabricate: When this permanent enters the battlefield, put N +1/+1 counters on it or create N 1/1 Servo artifact creature tokens.
Partner: You can have two commanders if both have partner.
Reconfigure: Pay the reconfigure cost: Attach this Equipment to target creature you control; or unattach it. Activate only as a sorcery. While attached, this isn't a creature.
